candidates.text: "Artificial intelligence and machine learning, quantum computing, blockchain technology, edge computing, the Internet of Things, 5G and 6G networks, cybersecurity, cloud computing, augmented and virtual reality, robotics, autonomous vehicles, digital twins, bioinformatics, smart cities, data analytics, cloud-native applications, software-defined everything, decentralized finance, the metaverse, human-computer interaction, digital transformation, platform economies, and open-source collaboration."
